name: Emilano Set of 2 Acacia Wood Club Chair - Natural Stained - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant Patio Accent Chairs with Polyester Cushions
description: These Christopher Knight Home Emilano Set of 2 Acacia Wood Club Chairs are a great addition to any patio. The acacia wood keeps these chairs both fresh and makes them ideal for an outdoor environment. The water resistant fabric of the cushions allows for small spills to be cleaned easily, as well as for these cushions to be left outside for the summer season. Add extra seating to your backyard, patio or deck with these Christopher Knight Home Emilano Set of 2 Acacia Wood Club Chairs. A purchase you will enjoy for years to come.
